positive: Minimalist geometric wave pattern forming a majestic, stylized ocean view. The pattern features smooth, clean curves and contrasting linework in deep sapphire blue, turquoise, and white. The composition is highly symmetrical and centralized, forming a strong, repeating decorative pattern suitable for fabric printing. Studio lighting, graphic novel aesthetic, vector art style, clean silhouettes, ultra-detailed linework, high contrast, flat lay perspective.
